sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*)
						FROM `$table`
						WHERE option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND OCTET_LENGTH(option_value) > %d",
					'\_transient\_%',
					'\_site\_transient\_%',
					self::BIG_OPTION_THRESHOLD_WARNING
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				"SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS posts_count
				 FROM {$table_name}
				 WHERE post_type != ''
				 GROUP BY post_type",
				OBJECT
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS posts_count
					 FROM {$table_name}
					 WHERE post_type != ''
					 GROUP BY post_type
					 HAVING COUNT(*) >= %d",
					$threshold
				),
				OBJECT
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT * FROM {$table_name} WHERE post_type = %s {$order_by_sql} LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
				$post_type,
				$items_per_page,
				$offset
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_var( "
				SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.cnt - 1), 0)
				FROM (
					SELECT 
						post_id,
						meta_key,
						CRC32(meta_value) AS vhash,
						COUNT(*)          AS cnt
					FROM {$table}
					GROUP BY post_id, meta_key, CRC32(meta_value)
					HAVING cnt > 1
				) AS g
			" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
				SELECT COUNT(*)
				FROM {$postmeta} main
				LEFT JOIN {$posts} p ON p.ID = main.post_id
				WHERE p.ID IS NULL
			" )
$wpdb->get_col( "SELECT blog_id FROM $wpdb->blogs ORDER BY blog_id ASC" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
			SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.cnt - 1), 0)
			FROM (
				SELECT
					user_id,
					meta_key,
					CRC32(meta_value) AS vhash,
					COUNT(*)          AS cnt
				FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
				GROUP BY user_id, meta_key, CRC32(meta_value)
				HAVING cnt > 1
			) AS g
		" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
			SELECT COUNT(*)
			FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} main
			LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON u.ID = main.user_id
			WHERE u.ID IS NULL
		" )

sinks.expression:
printf( '
⭐
%s

%s

⭐%s %s %s
%s
', esc_html__( 'Awesome!', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ), $text, $rating_url, esc_html__( 'Ok, you deserved it', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ), esc_html__( 'I already did', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ), esc_html__( 'No, not good enough', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ), esc_html__( 'Remind me later', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ), esc_html__( 'Dismiss', 'advanced-database-cleaner' ) )

$wpdb->query(
					$wpdb->prepare( "
					DELETE a, b FROM {$wpdb->options} a, {$wpdb->options} b
					WHERE a.option_name LIKE %s
					AND a.option_name NOT LIKE %s
					AND b.option_name = CONCAT( '_site_transient_timeout_', SUBSTRING( a.option_name, 17 ) )
					AND b.option_value < %d",
						$wpdb->esc_like( '_site_transient_' ) . '%',
						$wpdb->esc_like( '_site_transient_timeout_' ) . '%',
						time()
					)
				)

$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*)
						FROM `$table`
						WHERE option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND OCTET_LENGTH(option_value) > %d",
					'\_transient\_%',
					'\_site\_transient\_%',
					self::BIG_OPTION_THRESHOLD_WARNING
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				"SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS posts_count
				 FROM {$table_name}
				 WHERE post_type != ''
				 GROUP BY post_type",
				OBJECT
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS posts_count
					 FROM {$table_name}
					 WHERE post_type != ''
					 GROUP BY post_type
					 HAVING COUNT(*) >= %d",
					$threshold
				),
				OBJECT
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT * FROM {$table_name} WHERE post_type = %s {$order_by_sql} LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
				$post_type,
				$items_per_page,
				$offset
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_var( "
				SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.cnt - 1), 0)
				FROM (
					SELECT 
						post_id,
						meta_key,
						CRC32(meta_value) AS vhash,
						COUNT(*)          AS cnt
					FROM {$table}
					GROUP BY post_id, meta_key, CRC32(meta_value)
					HAVING cnt > 1
				) AS g
			" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
				SELECT COUNT(*)
				FROM {$postmeta} main
				LEFT JOIN {$posts} p ON p.ID = main.post_id
				WHERE p.ID IS NULL
			" )
$wpdb->get_col( "SELECT blog_id FROM $wpdb->blogs ORDER BY blog_id ASC" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
			SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.cnt - 1), 0)
			FROM (
				SELECT
					user_id,
					meta_key,
					CRC32(meta_value) AS vhash,
					COUNT(*)          AS cnt
				FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
				GROUP BY user_id, meta_key, CRC32(meta_value)
				HAVING cnt > 1
			) AS g
		" )

$wpdb->get_var( "
			SELECT COUNT(*)
			FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} main
			LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON u.ID = main.user_id
			WHERE u.ID IS NULL
		" )

sanitizers.expression: $wpdb->prepare( " AND ( main.{$this->name_column()} LIKE %s OR main.{$this->value_column()} LIKE %s )", $like, $like )

$wpdb->prepare( "
					DELETE a, b FROM {$wpdb->options} a, {$wpdb->options} b
					WHERE a.option_name LIKE %s
					AND a.option_name NOT LIKE %s
					AND b.option_name = CONCAT( '_site_transient_timeout_', SUBSTRING( a.option_name, 17 ) )
					AND b.option_value < %d",
						$wpdb->esc_like( '_site_transient_' ) . '%',
						$wpdb->esc_like( '_site_transient_timeout_' ) . '%',
						time()
					)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_COLLATION
			 FROM information_schema.TABLES
			 WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
			   AND TABLE_NAME IN ($placeholders)",
			...$table_names
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				`option_name`                           AS name,
				`option_id`                             AS option_id,
				SUBSTRING(`option_value`, 1, {$truncate_length}) AS value,
				`autoload`                              AS autoload,
				OCTET_LENGTH(`option_value`)            AS size,
				%d                                      AS site_id
			FROM {$table_name}
			{$where_sql}
			{$order_by_sql}
			LIMIT %d OFFSET %d
			",
			...$params
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				{$name_expr}     AS name,
				`option_id`      AS option_id,
				{$value_expr}    AS value,
				{$autoload_expr} AS autoload,
				OCTET_LENGTH(`option_value`) AS size,
				%d               AS site_id
			FROM {$table_name}
			{$where_sql}
			{$order_by_sql}
			LIMIT %d
			",
			...$params
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				COALESCE(
					SUM(
						CASE WHEN autoload IN ($in_placeholders)
							THEN LENGTH(option_value)
						END
					),
					0
				)
         	FROM {$wpdb->options}
			",
			...$autoload_values
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*)
						FROM `$table`
						WHERE option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
							AND OCTET_LENGTH(option_value) > %d",
					'\_transient\_%',
					'\_site\_transient\_%',
					self::BIG_OPTION_THRESHOLD_WARNING
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT option_name FROM `$table`
				WHERE option_name NOT LIKE %s
				AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
			'\_transient\_%',
			'\_site\_transient\_%',
			absint( $limit ),
			absint( $offset )
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT option_name FROM `$table`
				WHERE option_id IN ($in_placeholders)
				AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				AND option_name NOT LIKE %s",
			...$args
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT option_name AS name
				 FROM `{$table}`
				 WHERE option_name IN ( {$in_placeholders} )
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s",
				...array_merge( $options_names, [ '\_transient\_%', '\_site\_transient\_%' ] )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT post_type, COUNT(*) AS posts_count
					 FROM {$table_name}
					 WHERE post_type != ''
					 GROUP BY post_type
					 HAVING COUNT(*) >= %d",
					$threshold
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				main.`meta_key`                         AS name,
				main.`meta_id`                          AS meta_id,
				main.`post_id`                          AS post_id,
				SUBSTRING(main.`meta_value`, 1, {$truncate_length}) AS value,
				OCTET_LENGTH(main.`meta_value`)         AS size,
				%d                                      AS site_id
			FROM {$table_name} main
			{$duplicate_join_sql}
			{$where_sql}
			{$order_by_sql}
			LIMIT %d OFFSET %d
		",
			...$params
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				{$name_expr}                           AS name,
				main.`meta_id`                          AS meta_id,
				main.`post_id`                          AS post_id,
				{$value_expr}                          AS value,
				OCTET_LENGTH(main.`meta_value`)         AS size,
				%d                                      AS site_id
			FROM {$table_name} main
			{$duplicate_join_sql}
			{$where_sql}
			{$order_by_sql}
			LIMIT %d
			",
			...$params
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT meta_key FROM `$table` 
			 LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
			absint( $limit ),
			absint( $offset )
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT DISTINCT meta_key
			 FROM `$table`
			 WHERE meta_id IN ($in_placeholders)",
			...$posts_meta_ids
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT meta_key AS name
				 FROM `{$table}`
				 WHERE meta_key IN ( {$in_placeholders} )",
				...$posts_meta_names
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT 
				`TABLE_NAME` AS `table_name`, 
				(`DATA_LENGTH` + `INDEX_LENGTH`) AS `size`, 
				`TABLE_ROWS` AS `rows`, 
				`DATA_FREE` as `overhead`, 
				`ENGINE` AS `type`
			FROM 
				`information_schema`.`TABLES`
			WHERE 
				`TABLE_SCHEMA` = %s
			$order_by_sql
			LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
			DB_NAME,
			absint( $limit ),
			absint( $offset )
		)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = %s", DB_NAME )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT `TABLE_NAME` FROM `information_schema`.`TABLES`
				WHERE `TABLE_SCHEMA` = %s
				LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
			DB_NAME,
			absint( $limit ),
			absint( $offset )
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT option_name AS name
				 FROM `{$options_table}`
				 WHERE option_name IN ( {$in_placeholders} )
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s",
				...array_merge( $transients_names, [ '\_transient\_timeout\_%', '\_site\_transient\_timeout\_%' ] )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT DISTINCT meta_key AS name
					 FROM `{$sitemeta_table}`
					 WHERE meta_key IN ( {$in_placeholders} )
					   AND meta_key NOT LIKE %s",
					...array_merge( $transients_names, [ '\_site\_transient\_timeout\_%' ] )
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(*) 
				 FROM `{$options_table}`
				 WHERE ( option_name LIKE %s OR option_name LIKE %s )
				 AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				 AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				 AND LENGTH(option_value) > %d",
				$transient_like,
				$site_transient_like,
				$transient_timeout_like,
				$site_transient_timeout_like,
				$threshold
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*)
					 FROM `{$sitemeta_table}`
					 WHERE meta_key LIKE %s
					 AND meta_key NOT LIKE %s
					 AND LENGTH(meta_value) > %d",
					$site_transient_like,
					$site_transient_timeout_like,
					$threshold
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(*)
				 FROM `{$options_table}`
				 WHERE ( option_name LIKE %s OR option_name LIKE %s )
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s
				   AND option_name NOT LIKE %s",
				$transient_like,
				$site_transient_like,
				$transient_timeout_like,
				$site_transient_timeout_like
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*)
					 FROM `{$sitemeta_table}`
					 WHERE meta_key LIKE %s
					   AND meta_key NOT LIKE %s",
					$site_transient_like,
					$site_transient_timeout_like
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT
				main.`meta_key`                         			AS name,
				main.`umeta_id`                         			AS umeta_id,
				main.`user_id`                          			AS user_id,
				%d						   							AS site_id,
				SUBSTRING(main.`meta_value`, 1, {$truncate_length}) AS value,
				OCTET_LENGTH(main.`meta_value`)         			AS size
			FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} main
			{$duplicate_join_sql}
			{$where_sql}
			{$order_by_sql}
			LIMIT %d OFFSET %d
			",
			...$params
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT meta_key
			 FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} 
			 LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
			absint( $limit ),
			absint( $offset )
		)
